articles.title: Moiré engineering of Cooper-pair density modulation states - nature.com
articles.description: Researchers created a moiré superlattice in Sb2Te3/FeTe bilayers, producing spatially modulated superconducting gaps directly imaged with Josephson scanning tunnelling microscopy and spectroscopy, tunable by replacing Sb2Te3 with Bi2Te3.

articles.title: Every Video Game Prank From April Fools' Day 2026 - Game Informer
articles.description: From a horse controller to dateable dirt, the video game industry likes to go wild on April Fools' Day.
